title: Jalore Fort
tagline: Jalore Fort — heritage city of Rajasthan

overview.short: Jalore Fort also known as Swarnagiri (golden mountain) is the main attraction of Jalore, a town in the Indian state of Rajasthan, and one of the nine forts of the Maru, under the P
overview.description: Jalore Fort also known as Swarnagiri (golden mountain) is the main attraction of Jalore, a town in the Indian state of Rajasthan, and one of the nine forts of the Maru, under the Paramaras in the 10th century. It is one of the most famous and impressive forts in the state and has been known through history as the Svangiri or the "golden mount".From this fort, the Songra Chauhans defeated the Delhi Sultanate ruler Alauddin Khalji. With the blessings of Kuldevi Maa Ashapura who is also known as Modara Mata. Chauhan gave a different direction to Jalore and to the fort.

topPlaces.name: Guda Balotan
topPlaces.description: Guda Balotan is a village in Ahore tehsil of Jalore District of Rajasthan state in India. It is situated on Jalore-Sanderao road (SH-16).

topPlaces.name: Jalore
topPlaces.description: Jalore () (ISO 15919 : Jālora ), also known as Granite City, is a city in the western Indian state of Rajasthan. It is the administrative headquarters of Jalore District.

topPlaces.name: Sire Mandir
topPlaces.description: Sire Mandir is a Hindu temple dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva (as a form of Jalindra Nath). It is located 646 meters above sea level on the Kanyachal hills near the Jalore Fort in Jalore city in the state of Rajasthan, India.

topPlaces.name: Sankarna
topPlaces.description: Sankarna (सांकरणा ) is a village in Jalor district of Rajasthan. It is located in the south of Rajasthan, 10 km from district headquarters.

items.note: Guda Balotan is a village in Ahore tehsil of Jalore District of Rajasthan state in India. It is situated on Jalore-Sanderao road (SH-16).
Jalore () (ISO 15919 : Jālora ), also known as Granite City, is a city in the western Indian state of Rajasthan. It is the administrative headquarters of Jalore District.

Sire Mandir is a Hindu temple dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva (as a form of Jalindra Nath). It is located 646 meters above sea level on the Kanyachal hills near the Jalore Fort in Jalore city in the state of Rajasthan, India.
Sankarna (सांकरणा ) is a village in Jalor district of Rajasthan. It is located in the south of Rajasthan, 10 km from district headquarters.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Jalore Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Jalore Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Jalore Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jodhpur Airport (111 km) and the nearest railway station is Jodhpur Junction (114 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Jalore Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Jalore Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Jalore Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Jalore Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Jalore Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Guda Balotan, Jalore, Sire Mandir, Sankarna.
